name: G Pen Micro+ Tank
summary: Enhance your vaping experience with the G Pen Micro+ Replacement Tank, engineered for smooth, flavorful hits every time.
description: Enhance your vaping experience with the G Pen Micro+ Replacement Tank, engineered for smooth, flavorful hits every time. Its advanced ceramic plate heating element ensures even heat distribution without combustion, preserving the full taste and potency of your concentrates. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
